data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. KOUSIN KARL scored a dominant win off the inside draw at this course and distance last time out. Likely to get all the favours from this nice draw. Must raise the bar but another win is not out of the question. 5. SLY HELP made a winning return at his latest appearance a week ago, getting home by 0.8 metres over 1609m at this track. Must raise the bar but he has the ability to test this field. 10. NIGHTHAWK ZETTE is a great chance after a string of sound recent performances, the latest a solid second at this track over 1609m. Hard to find fault. 4. DOUBLE A CATALAC is close to a win after two successive placings, the latest a third over 1609m at this track.","runners":[1,5,10,4],"exclusive":false}
